hero.subtitle: Engineer and PhD, working on the design and development of digital systems, from data modeling through to production deployment. Across my projects, I have worked at different stages of the stack: structuring data-related problems, developing backend services to process them, designing interfaces that make them accessible, and helping maintain the infrastructure that supports them.

about.p1: Having worked across several countries, I've developed a way of approaching projects that goes beyond the technical: listening before proposing, adapting to different contexts, and collaborating with teams from diverse cultural backgrounds.
about.p2: I believe the best software is the kind that quietly simplifies people's work — and gives them back time for what truly matters.
about.p3: This conviction shapes both my technical decisions and the way I engage with business teams.

projects.meta_desc: Projects and achievements in full-stack development, data engineering and DevOps.

blog.meta_desc: Articles on development, data engineering and web technologies.

travel.desc: Working across different cultures has taught me to communicate with precision, adapt quickly, and design universal solutions in very different contexts.

contact.desc: Open to freelance opportunities and technical collaborations. Please feel free to contact me to discuss further.
